original_prompt: 给这个一套首饰做一张亚马逊白底图，要求放在黑色人体模特上，深色背景。
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
Commercial product photography of a luxury jewelry set including a tiara, necklace, and earrings. The jewelry is displayed on a sleek, matte black mannequin bust to maximize contrast. The background is a deep, rich charcoal or pure black, creating a dramatic high-end boutique atmosphere. Lighting is studio-quality rim lighting and spot lighting to make the clear crystals and silver filigree sparkle intensely against the darkness. The tiara sits atop the mannequin head, the V-shaped necklace drapes perfectly around the neck, and earrings are positioned near where ears would be. The jewelry features baroque-inspired crystal filigree with large teardrop center stones and a polished silver finish.

[Text & UI Layout]
No text overlaid. The composition focuses entirely on the product presentation, centering the mannequin in the frame with ample negative space around the edges for potential cropping.
layout_logic: Although Amazon usually requires a pure white background for the *main* image, this request specifically asks for a black mannequin on a dark background. This style is often used for secondary lifestyle images or 'Premium A+' content to show how the jewelry looks when worn and to emphasize the sparkle of the crystals through high contrast. The layout centers the bust to showcase the full set's coordination.
